data.title: Nvidia, Google And Microsoft To Present AI Tools Aimed At Reducing Healthcare Worker Burnout At Las Vegas Conference
data.description: Leading tech firms, including Nvidia Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA), Alphabet Inc's Google (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG), and Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT), are preparing to showcase their artificial intelligence (AI) tools at the forthcoming HLTH healthcare technology conference in Las Vegas.

data.title: Elon Musk's Pro-Trump Super PAC To Give $1M Every Day To People In Swing States For Signing His Petition
data.description: Billionaire Elon Musk on Saturday reportedly gave away $1 million to a man named John Dreher who attended his event in Pennsylvania aimed at rallying support for former President Donald Trump.

data.title: Nvidia Stock Is Up Over 233% In The Past Year And Tech Bulls Say It Could Go Even Higher From Here: '…You'll See The Stock Double Over The Next Several Years'
data.description: Nvidia Corp shares closed up 0.8% at $138 on Friday, taking its market capitalization to over $3 trillion, but the stock can go higher, according to bullish experts.

data.title: Southwest Airlines In Settlement Talks With Activist Investor Elliott Management To Avoid Proxy Fight For Board Control: Report
data.description: Elliott Investment Management and Southwest Airlines have begun discussing a potential settlement that could avoid a proxy fight for control of the airline company's board.

data.title: Kamala Harris Blames Amber Thurman's Death On Georgia Abortion Law, Slams Trump For 'Cruel' Remarks
data.description: Vice President Kamala Harris on Saturday blamed Amber Thurman's death in Aug. 2022 on Georgia's abortion laws and accused former President Donald Trump of belittling her family's sorrow.
